title: SuperSimpleSilencer
description: Mute Or Unmute Any Sound With A Single Command.
body:
Mute Or Unmute Any Sound With A Single Command.
# Installation

Just Drop The Jar Into Your Client's Mods Folder.

# Commands

* **"sound.mute <_Name_>" - Mute A Sound.**
* **"sound.unmute <_Name_>" - Unmute A Sound.**
* **"sound.list" - List Muted Sounds.**

# Config

No Configuration Commands Are Available For This Project.
